allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('db.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('db.py OK'\); ast.parse\(open\('main.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.MainWindowTitle -eq "" } | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime)
